name: I'm on deck
hints: You're on the ship's deck. You can see the dock and sea from here.
DOWN returns to the cabin. GO SEA jumps into the water but drops your items.
DOWN goes back to the ship's cabin (room 2). GO SEA puts you in the water (room 11) and auto-drops items.
Use DOWN to return to the cabin. Only jump into the sea if you're prepared to swim and lose your carried items.
notes: Ship's deck above the cabin. DOWN returns to the cabin (room 2). GO SEA jumps into water (room 11) and auto-drops items plus sets flag 28. The dock and sea are visible but mainly decorative.
